top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN health = 'Good' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_good
FROM trees
WHERE boroname = 'Bronx';

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN health = 'Good' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_good
FROM trees
WHERE boroname = 'Bronx';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN health = 'Good' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_good
FROM trees
WHERE boroname = 'Bronx';

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN health = 'Good' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_good
FROM trees
WHERE boroname = 'Bronx';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN health = 'Good' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_good
FROM trees
WHERE boroname = 'Bronx';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN health = 'Good' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_good
FROM trees
WHERE boroname = 'Bronx';

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN health = 'Good' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_good
FROM trees
WHERE boroname = 'Bronx';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN health = 'Good' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_good
FROM trees
WHERE boroname = 'Bronx';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN health = 'Good' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_good
FROM trees
WHERE boroname = 'Bronx';
